hooks.command: if git diff --quiet HEAD -- index.html 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; git add index.html && git commit -q -m "Auto-update site $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push -q origin HEAD 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage":"index.html committed and pushed — live site updating in ~1 min"}' || echo '{"systemMessage":"Auto-commit/push failed — run git status / git push manually"}'
